dashboard.empty.title: Connect your first warehouse
dashboard.empty.text: For Veloseller to start calculating your sales velocity, it needs daily SKU records. First estimates — in 7 days. Accurate figures — in a month. Summary reports arrive by email.
dashboard.title: Warehouse overview
dashboard.warmup.nothingYet: Nothing has been calculated for this warehouse yet
dashboard.warmup.detailCritical: All figures are approximate. Velocity, coverage, dead stock and lost revenue stabilize in two weeks. Wait a week and come back — the picture will be fundamentally different.
dashboard.warmup.detailWarn: Calculations haven't plateaued yet. Velocity and coverage may change noticeably each day. In two weeks the figures will become stable.
dashboard.card.lowStock.label: Low stock
dashboard.card.lowStock.tip:
Items that will run out within 7 days at the current sales velocity.
Formula: Stock / TVelo velocity < 7 days
dashboard.card.lowStock.sub: running out in a week, restock needed
dashboard.card.lostRevenue.label: Lost revenue
dashboard.card.lostRevenue.tip:
Revenue lost because the item was out of stock.
Formula: TVelo velocity × Price × OOS days
dashboard.card.lostRevenue.sub: missed over the period due to stockouts
dashboard.card.dead.label: Dead stock
dashboard.card.dead.tip:
These items will take more than 6 months to sell at the current velocity.
Formula: Stock / TVelo velocity > 180 days
dashboard.health.tip: Weighted assessment of warehouse health. Inactive SKUs are excluded from the calculation.
dashboard.inventoryValue.label: Money in stock
dashboard.inventoryValue.tip:
Total value of stock at the current retail price.
Formula: Price × Stock
dashboard.frozen.label: Frozen in dead stock
dashboard.frozen.tip:
Money tied up in items that will take over six months to sell.
Formula: Price × Stock where Coverage > 180 days
dashboard.kpi.totalSku.label: Total SKUs
dashboard.kpi.oos.label: Out of stock
dashboard.kpi.oos.tip: Products currently out of stock that sold in the last month. Restock urgently.
dashboard.kpi.inactive.label: Inactive SKUs
dashboard.kpi.inactive.tip: SKUs with no stock and no movement over the last 30 days.
dashboard.kpi.active.label: Active products
dashboard.kpi.active.tip: Products with stock above 0 or activity in the last 30 days.
dashboard.conc.inventory.label: Inventory concentration
dashboard.conc.inventory.tip: How many SKUs make up 50% of inventory. It's best to spread the assortment evenly.
dashboard.conc.demand.label: Demand concentration
dashboard.conc.demand.tip: How many products bring in half your revenue. A small number is a bottleneck: these items are critical.
dashboard.conc.oos.label: Frequently out of stock
dashboard.conc.oos.tip: Products that were out of stock for more than 2 weeks in the last month. Regular shortages are a reason to review logistics and purchasing rhythm.
dashboard.conc.oos.sub: out of stock more than 15 days in a month
dashboard.velocity.header: Sales velocity by SKU for warehouse «{warehouse}»
dashboard.velocity.headerTip: How sales velocity is distributed across your products. You can see bestsellers, mid-tier and slow movers.
dashboard.velocity.fast.label: Fast
dashboard.velocity.fast.tip: The velocity of your bestsellers — the top 10% fastest products. They carry the warehouse's revenue.
dashboard.velocity.mid.label: Average
dashboard.velocity.mid.tip: Average across all active products. A baseline to compare new items against.
dashboard.velocity.slow.label: Slow
dashboard.velocity.slow.tip: The velocity of the slowest products — the bottom 10%. Candidates for clearance or delisting.
dashboard.chart.health.title: Warehouse health over {n} {unit}
dashboard.chart.health.tip: How the overall warehouse condition changes over time. Higher is better: 70+ green zone, 40-70 yellow, below 40 — attention. {suffix}
dashboard.chart.lostRevenue.tip: Trend of losses from products selling out. Rising — you're losing more; falling — you're keeping up with purchasing. {suffix}
dashboard.chart.segments.title: Distribution by segment
dashboard.chart.segments.tip: Distribution of the assortment by demand pattern: stable, fast, slow, dead stock, little data.
dashboard.dead.title: Dead stock (products > 6 months)
dashboard.dead.tip: How the number of dead-stock products and the money frozen in them change over time. {suffix}
dashboard.dead.sub: Trend of SKU count and frozen money
dashboard.potential.title: Potential revenue
dashboard.potential.tip: How much you can earn at the current sales velocity over the period. Calculated as the sum of TVelo velocity × price per SKU. {suffix}
dashboard.potential.sub: Trend of possible revenue at the current velocity
dashboard.alerts.title: Latest events
dashboard.suffix.fallback: Showing the whole store for now — data for this specific warehouse is still accumulating.
